summary: TWO_COLUMN Möbius f(z)=(z+1)/(z-1) applied to grid of 4 concentric circles + 8 radial lines. LEFT ComplexPlane input + RED pole at z=1. RIGHT shows image. ValueTracker t_tr interpolates (1-t)z + t·f(z) for each curve via always_redraw; circles/lines ↔ circles/lines (extended plane). Pole z=1 → ∞, z=-1 → 0.
